Good beef should be treat well
BEEF HAVEN Born in Beijing 2025 ，Founder NIUCAO crazy about Hamburgers.We believe
：
.Choose high quality beef baking high temperature.
Every detail is for the sign of burger heaven.
From our very first corner shop to the beloved burger brand we are today, we have consistently insisted on open kitchens where every customer can witness the sizzling moment when the beef hits the griddle. Because we believe
🍔 "Take a bite, and it is heaven" — this is our unwavering promise to you.
Our values
🥩✨
Quality First
Only 100% pure beef is selected,
freshly delivered to the store daily,
made to order, refusing pre-made products,
restoring the original taste of the ingredients.
⚡🔥
Unslowed
Order online and pick up in-store; dine-in orders
are served in an average of no more than 8 minutes,
so delicious food doesn't require a long wait.
❤️🍔
Enthusiastic service
Every team member carries a love for hamburgers
and treats each order with care,
making the dining experience warm and heartfelt.
📍 Find us
🏠
Sadovaya street 888 BEEF HAVEN
📞
Tel：020-8888 6666 (10:00-22:00)
🕒 Business Hours
All week：10:00 - 22:00 (Last order 21:30)
🍔 Open as usual on weekends and holidays. Welcome!
🗺️📍

Every detail is for the sign of burger heaven.
From our very first corner shop to the beloved burger brand we are today, we have consistently insisted on open kitchens where every customer can witness the sizzling moment when the beef hits the griddle. Because we believe
🍔 "Take a bite, and it is heaven" — this is our unwavering promise to you.
Our values
🥩✨
Quality First
Only 100% pure beef is selected,
freshly delivered to the store daily,
made to order, refusing pre-made products,
restoring the original taste of the ingredients.

Order online and pick up in-store; dine-in orders

so delicious food doesn't require a long wait.
